title: MacBook Pro USB-C charging troubleshooting
summary: Steps to triage a MacBook that won't charge: try a second known-good cable + adapter, reset SMC, check for swollen battery, then escalate to hardware swap if no change.

title: Granting access to the github.com/olympus org
summary: Approval flow for GitHub org access: requires line-manager + security approval. Read access via 'olympus-read', write via 'olympus-write'. Add user via SCIM provisioning, never manual invite.

title: Workday SSO MFA loop — common causes and fixes
summary: Most common cause is device time skew (TOTP off by >30s). Other causes: stale MFA token in Entra, blocked sign-in from new IP, expired Workday session cookie. Steps and Powershell snippets included.

title: Outlook iOS dropping connection — Modern Auth checks
summary: Outlook iOS losing connection is usually one of: Modern Auth disabled at mailbox level, MDM config-profile push pending, or stale CA token. Triage steps and remediation included.

title: VIP support handling — escalation playbook
summary: Priorities P1/P2 for VIPs must be acknowledged within 15 minutes and updated every 30 minutes until resolution. Auto-page on-call manager. Include in the daily exec-IT briefing if open >2h.

title: New-hire IT provisioning checklist
summary: Standard kit for new hires: laptop (role-specific spec), dock, monitor, headset. Account creation in Entra → group assignment → mailbox license. Tasks split between IT Provisioning and Identity & Access.
